description: Bootstrap + $HOME 级 SessionStart hooks（状态栏、MCP、插件、LSP）

hooks.command: bash -c 'D=~/.claude/hooks/scripts; [ -L "$D/ensure-agents-skills.sh" ] && [ -e "$D/ensure-agents-skills.sh" ] && exit 0; for loc in $(python3 -c "import json,os; d=json.load(open(os.path.expanduser(\"~/.claude/plugins/known_marketplaces.json\"))); [print(v.get(\"installLocation\",\"\")) for v in d.values()]" 2>/dev/null); do s="$loc/plugins/sync/scripts"; [ -d "$s" ] && { mkdir -p "$D"; for f in "$s"/*.sh; do ln -sf "$f" "$D/$(basename "$f")"; done; break; }; done'
